name: io.github.GTCC777/mcp-pulsenetwork
description: 67 AI-powered intelligence verticals (660+ endpoints) in one x402-native MCP server — finance, crypto, on-chain, legal, healthcare, immigration, real estate, careers, travel, and more. Agents pay-per-query autonomously via USDC.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key of the agent's funded wallet (Base/USDC) used to autonomously pay x402 charges per query.
